text.title: Blameless Postmortem Facilitation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) + valid/invalid examples + forbidden patterns for blameless-postmortem-facilitation output.

example.note: Modal blame phrasing in `contributing_factors`; language_lint_passed must be true; required fields missing.

list.item: wildcard values where enum is required
values outside enum / pattern / numeric bounds
